summary: The use of an intensifying screen enhances image clarity and reduces scattered radiation in extraoral radiography, improving diagnostic accuracy without significantly raising dose levels to the patient. Key benefits include increased visibility of anatomical details crucial for proper diagnosis and treatment planning. \(\square\) Agent1 summarized that using an intensifying screen improves image quality and reduces scattering in extraoral radiographs, enhancing detail visibility essential for diagnostics; it also minimizes patient radiation dosage due to reduced required exposure time.
